name: skz hyung line
description:
🏢☆*:.｡. || New Girl

—

recently, you broke up with your boyfriend, spencer, because he was cheating on you. you decided to search for a new place to stay on craigslist, and found a loft with three people which you assumed were three girls— which you later found out were three guys; Bang Chan, Leeknow and Hyunjin. There’s a fourth one, Changbin, but he doesn’t move in until later.

—

i love the show new girl guys……… 😍 also did i even associate them w the right characters bc genuinely idk why i put bang chan as coach brah he’s more changbin thing ACTUALLY I LIED i put them with their like personalities and stuff. ANYWAY what the hell does the token things mean scan someone pls explain THANK YEWWWWW
creator: loviwonyi
